name: iterate-ai
description: Plugins from the AgentOne platform by Iterate.ai — token optimization, observability, deployment, and more.

plugins.name: agentone-token-compression
plugins.description: Cut your Claude token bill 40–90% on verbose/repetitive tool output (less on prose). Automatic compression for Claude Code via hooks, and on-demand compression for Claude Desktop via a bundled MCP server. Compresses prompts, tool outputs, and file reads with mask-union safety for API keys and UUIDs. Part of the AgentOne platform.
